brief_notes: Dense, technical baseline. Abstract crams numerous precise statistics (65%/76%, 95.6x/105.1x, 264 instances, 1229.8s, 71749.1s, 1.44/2.40 for B-ALL, CSC28 0.273/0.473, POP66 3.280/4.770). All numbers verified against extraction. Includes theorems, dual LP formulation, and methods, but compact - no figures, shorter Discussion, less elaboration on interpretation. Citations reasonable. Writing is terse but correct.
